theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 71점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 69 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 7.2% → 2-ATR 손절폭 14.4%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 4개 시그널 합류 — Value Area High, Fib 0.618, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +2.1% 위치. T1 $36.08 (R:R 0.3), T2 $38 (R:R 0.8)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $34.82 아래 손절가 $30.64 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 67점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 53 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Codelco Union Threatens Protests as Misreporting Fallout Spreads
top_news.summary: One of Codelco’s biggest unions vowed to fight any attempt to claw back bonuses as fallout from the overstatement of copper output at the Chilean state miner continues to spread.

top_news.title: Korea Short-Term Debt Pricing Too Many BOK Hikes, NH Amundi Says
top_news.summary: South Korea’s bond market is pricing in an excessive number of central bank rate hikes, creating buying opportunities in short-term debt, according to NH Amundi Asset Management Co.

top_news.title: Aegea Investors, Equatorial Bid in One of Brazil’s Biggest Deals This Year
top_news.summary: Two groups submitted bids to become the strategic investor in Copasa, advancing the Minas Gerais state government’s plan to privatize one of Brazil’s largest water and sewage utilities, according to people familiar to the matter.

top_news.title: Gold Gains as Prospects of Iran Deal Temper Inflation Concerns
top_news.summary: Gold advanced after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows, easing inflation fears.

top_news.title: Cox Group Took 20% Bridge Loan for Iberdrola Mexico Deal
top_news.summary: Spanish utility Cox ABG Group SA took a bridge loan to help fund a $4.2 billion asset acquisition in Mexico and placed shares as collateral.

top_news.title: Ghana to Start Buying 30% of Large Gold Mines’ Ouput From June
top_news.summary: Ghana’s central bank said it plans to increase gold purchases from the West African nation’s large-scale producers to 30% of their output from 20%, starting June 1.

top_news.title: US Stock Futures Gain as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. The dollar weakened.

top_news.title: Czech Premier Urges Interest Rate Cut as Inflation Risks Grow
top_news.summary: The Czech Republic’s prime minister urged the central bank to cut interest rates, doubling down on his push for lower borrowing costs even as the country faces growing inflation risks from energy prices.

top_news.title: Top Bauxite Producer Guinea to Unveil Export Controls in June
top_news.summary: Guinea, the world’s biggest bauxite producer, plans to announce reforms next month to control exports of the ore used in making aluminum as it bids to bolster prices.

top_news.title: Nigeria’s First Quarter GDP Eases on Slowdown in Oil Sector
top_news.summary: Nigeria’s economy grew at a slower-than-expected pace in the first quarter as growth in both its oil and non-oil sectors eased.
